news-item.text: Renee, Anson, and I presented our poster on Viblio at the 2022 URS
Renee Wang and I presented our workshop paper at ICWSM 2021
I presented my work on Viblio so far with in the Usability group at the 2021 URS
I was invited to present my work on Viblio under the WikiUX Grant at Mozilla Festival with the Credibilty Coalition
I wrote an article on the background of my project for MisInfoCon
